message:
chore(beads): close issues for integer sidecar reduction fixes and shift correctness

Closes franken_numpy-3k6g (reduce_sum_where sidecar preservation),
franken_numpy-8s8d (initial sum/prod sidecar preservation), and
franken_numpy-ona0 (cumulative and nan integer wrapper sidecar preservation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
